C:\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\smart_editor.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\smart_editor.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\smart_editor.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\smart_editor.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bin\smart_editor.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libsmart_editor.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\smart_editor.dir\linkLibs.rsp
